name: Waltons Mountain Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 each 15 oz. packages frozen white dinnerroll dough (18-24 dough balls total)
1 package (4 serving-size) INSTANT Butterscoch pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease a 10 in fluted tube pan.
2. Sprinkle pecans in the bottom of the pan.
3. Arrange the frozen dough balls on top of the pecans.
4. Sprinkle pudding mix over dough balls.
5. In a small saucepan, cook and stir brown sugar, butter or margarine along with cinnamon until butter is melted.
6. Pour the butter mixture over the pudding mix and dough balls in the tube pan.
7. Cover and refrigerate for 12 to 24 hours.
8. Uncover and bake at 350°F oven for about 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
9. Immediately invert the coffee cake onto a good size serving tray.
10. Let stand about 15 minutes to cool slightly.
11. Makes 12 delicious servings.
